_purpose: Ground-truth verified galaxy geography for LOGH VII. Built by cross-checking content/galaxy.json against (1) client MsgDat decoded strings [msgdat-full.json], (2) official manual text [manual.layout.txt], (3) manual PDF page-101 star-map Text annotations [gin7manual.pdf], (4) client 3D index [Null_galaxy.mdx].

_ground_truth_sources.msgdat: client data/MsgDat decoded (msgdat-full.json) - trustworthy decoded strings
_ground_truth_sources.manual_pdf_annotations: gin7manual.pdf page 101: 80 /Text annotations (Rect coords match galaxy.json cx exactly, m=1.0000)
_ground_truth_sources.client_mdx: data/model/strategy/Null_galaxy.mdx: 79 star_NN_<class> nodes + 3 bh + 3 ns (generic IDs, NO names)

_findings_summary.system_names_verdict: VERIFIED - all 80 system names found in client MsgDat strings
_findings_summary.coordinates_verdict: VERIFIED-SOURCE - cx/cy extracted from 80 PDF Text annotations on manual p101 star map (cx exact match, cy constant-offset match). NOT AI-invented.
_findings_summary.faction_verdict: PARTIAL - 34 systems match manual deployment army split (帝国軍/同盟軍) exactly; Fezzan=neutral confirmed manual p41; remaining 45 are lore-inferred, not source-attested. NOTE: faction does NOT match map marker color geography.
_findings_summary.mdx_index_note: Client mdx galaxy index uses generic star_01..79 IDs with spectral class only; contains NO Japanese system/planet/fortress names. Binary cannot attest names.
